title: Roasted Syrian Farfalle Pasta
description: An earthy and dense vegan-friendly dish featuring roasted farfalle pasta that serves as an excellent hangover-cure option.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of whole wheat farfalle pasta
2 tbsp fresh herbs (thyme and oregano blend)

instructions: Rinse the farfalle pasta under cold water and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes, herbs, salt, black pepper, cumin, and coriander. Stir well to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Add the farfalle pasta to the skillet, toss gently with tongs until coated evenly with the sauce.
Transfer the dish onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast in a preheated oven at 425°F (218°C) for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly before serving.
